# India News AI

## About
India News AI is India's first AI-powered live news platform. We provide verified, real-time breaking news covering Technology, Entertainment, Fashion, Politics, World News, Religion, Culture, Health, and Weather.

## URL
https://indianewsai.com

## Categories
- Breaking News
- Technology & AI
- Entertainment & Bollywood
- Fashion
- Politics
- World News
- Religion & Spirituality
- Culture
- Weather
- Health

## Coverage Area
Primary: Delhi NCR (Delhi, Noida, Gurugram, Faridabad, Ghaziabad)
Secondary: Pan-India and World

## Latest Articles (April 2026)
- Wall Street Banks Begin Testing Anthropic's Restricted Claude Mythos AI Model
- Shilpa Shetty's On-Set Burn Story and Kajol's DDLJ Endorsement
- April 2026 Street Style: Capris, Stripes, and Metropolitan Prep
- Reliance Accelerates Battery Giga Factories and $110B AI Infrastructure Push
- Israeli Strikes Continue in Lebanon, Testing Fragile US-Iran Ceasefire
- Met Gala 2026: 'Fashion Is Art' Theme Announced for May 4
- OpenAI Launches GPT-5 With Real-Time Reasoning
- Parliament Passes Landmark Digital India Budget 2026
- IPL 2026: Record-Breaking Season Opener Draws 120 Million Viewers
- Apple Vision Pro 2 Launches in India
- India Leads G20 Climate-Tech Alliance

## Content Type
Automated AI-curated and verified news articles with editorial oversight.
